text:
@Querty1995

"We Are One" reminds me alot of "This Land" from the Lion King SNES game.
author: @SonicTheJackrabbit

text: I don't hate the movie, it just could of been a whole lot better if it was given a bit more thought and time.
author: @Querty1995

text:
@SonicTheJackrabbit

I agree. My favorite number of music is the first one, where Simba has easily the best singing voice in the movie, second place in singing voice going to young Kirara. The song really portrays the serious but gentle nature of Simba and makes Kiara bit less flat  of a character than she used to be.
author: @Querty1995
@SonicTheJackrabbit

text: On the upside, Kovu is portrayed nicely as his self torn between his orders and his heart, Simba is portrayed excellently as a caring, smart, and king father figure, and the story wraps up nicely. Not to mention the references in location and situation from the original too!
author: @Querty1995

text: To add to the list of bad parts, the musical numbers for Kovu/Kiara love scene and Kovu's "Deception" were completely pointless and pretty abrasive to the ears. To nail the coffin in a movie that was ok, but couldn't match the original, Simba, Timon, Pumbaa, and Zazu don't age a single ounce! Other than go a few tones downward in color, nothing changes!
author: @Querty1995

text: The lion king 2 was a pretty good movie, despite the fact that Zira was basically thrown into the story out of nowhere, and that she doesn't have much personality or screen time otherwise. I also didn't like how Kirara did basically nothing and wasn't much of an integral part if the movie. To add, the animators would have made the movie a whole lot better if they added more scenes of Nuka and Vitani interacting between the characters, instead of having them have basically no role in the story.
author: @Querty1995

text:

Aside from the unexplained inconsistency of Scar having his own pride, the movie is actually really faithful to the first movie.(Even though it's no where as good.) Unlike other sequels. (*COUGHDONBLUTHCOUGH*) I don't understand why som nay people hate the movie so much, it's not that bad. Not to mention Kovu was actually pretty badass. Besides, there have been FAR more worse Disney sequels than that. (I'm looking at you, Hunchback of Notredame 2! You piece of cowshit! D8<)
